ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offerings" (
  "offering_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each cloud offering */,
  "instance_family_id" TEXT /* ID of the instance family */,
  "region_id" TEXT /* ID of the region */,
  "hourly_commitment_to_purchase" REAL /* Hourly commitment to purchase the instance */,
  "estimated_savings_plans_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the instance under a Savings Plan */,
  "estimated_on_demand_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the instance On-Demand */,
  "current_average_hourly_on_demand_spend" REAL /* Current average hourly On-Demand spend */,
  "current_minimum_hourly_on_demand_spend" REAL /* Current minimum hourly On-Demand spend */,
  "current_maximum_hourly_on_demand_spend" REAL /* Current maximum hourly On-Demand spend */,
  "estimated_average_utilization" REAL /* Estimated average utilization of the instance */,
  "estimated_monthly_savings_amount" REAL /* Estimated monthly savings amount */,
  "estimated_savings_percentage" REAL /* Estimated savings percentage */,
  "estimated_roi" REAL /* Estimated return on investment (ROI) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offering was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the offering was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offerings_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offerings_instance_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_family_id") REFERENCES instance_families ("instance_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "geographical_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the region */,
  "data_center_count" INTEGER /* Number of data centers in the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instance_families" (
  "instance_family_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each instance family */,
  "instance_family_name" TEXT /* Name of the instance family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instance family */,
  "use_case" TEXT /* Common use case for the instance family */,
  "processor_type" TEXT /* Type of processor used in the instance family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings_plans" (
  "savings_plan_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each Savings Plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the Savings Plan */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the Savings Plan */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate offered by the Savings Plan */,
  "payment_option" TEXT /* Payment option for the Savings Plan (e.g., upfront, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("savings_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost metric */,
  "offering_id" TEXT /* ID of the cloud offering */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the cost metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the cost metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the cost metric (e.g., dollars, percent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_metrics_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utilization_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utilization metric */,
  "offering_id" TEXT /* ID of the cloud offering */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the utilization metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the utilization metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the utilization metric (e.g., percent, hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilization_metrics_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "savings_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each savings metric */,
  "offering_id" TEXT /* ID of the cloud offering */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the savings metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the savings metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the savings metric (e.g., dollars, percent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_savings_metrics_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, financial analyst, IT manager) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "offering_id" TEXT /* ID of the cloud offering being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the offering */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the offering was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the offering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., cost analysis, utilization analysis) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "offering_id" TEXT /* ID of the cloud offering */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "offering_id" TEXT /* ID of the cloud offering related to the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., price drop, new offering) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "offering_id" TEXT /* ID of the cloud offering related to the audit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit occurred */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
